overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through an open prairie landscape with large rock formations. A horse-drawn carriage passes by in the middle of the clip. The scene features bright midday lighting with scattered clouds and cinematic game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail between rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the grassy valley between large rock formations

entered.detail: large layered rock formation with flat top visible on the left side of the trail
tall steep rock cliff face visible in the distance on the right side
worn dirt path with grass edges winding through the prairie landscape
tall green grass and scrub vegetation covering the prairie floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through an open prairie landscape under a bright blue sky. A large rock butte dominates the left side while a distant cliff rises on the right. The environment is peaceful and empty except for the natural vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with passing horse-drawn carriage

events.description: horse-drawn carriage appears in the distance ahead on the trail
carriage passes by the character on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily as a horse-drawn carriage approaches and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling along the dirt trail, moving in the opposite direction and passing the character

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse-drawn carriage appears ahead and approaches along the trail. The carriage passes by on the right side, creating a brief traffic interaction. The rock formations shift in perspective as the character moves forward through the valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing valley with steep rock cliff

agents.ego_description: resuming the journey along the trail after the carriage has passed, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the far distance ahead through the valley

segments.scene_description: After the carriage passes, the character continues down the trail through a narrowing valley. The right rock cliff looms closer while the left butte falls behind. Distant mountains become visible ahead as the trail winds through the grassy prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail through a peaceful prairie that transitions from a solitary walk into a brief encounter with travelers. It begins with the character traversing an open landscape under a bright blue sky, flanked by a dominant rock butte on the left and a distant cliff on the right. As the character moves forward, the perspective of the surrounding rock formations shifts, guiding the view deeper into the valley. The scene then introduces a horse-drawn carriage that appears ahead and passes by on the right, creating a momentary interaction on the trail before the camera continues its steady progression through the natural vegetation.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail as the landscape shifts from an open prairie into a narrowing valley. It begins immediately after a carriage passes, following the character as they venture deeper into the terrain. As the character advances, the right rock cliff looms closer and more imposing while the butte on the left gradually falls behind. The scene then opens up ahead, revealing distant mountains that emerge on the horizon as the trail winds further through the grassy plains.
